svg.style: background-color: #C7B8EA; color: #5C6BC0; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px;
svg.title: Topological Sorting

g.text: A linear ordering of vertices in a directed acyclic graph (DAG)
such that for every edge (u,v), vertex u comes before v
A graph with three vertices and three edges
Topological sorting is a fundamental algorithm in computer science, with numerous applications in various fields
It helps in resource allocation, scheduling, and network analysis, making it an essential tool for developers and researchers
